FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7fbd31e8f600>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-13T15:26:23Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-13T15:24:44Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/13 15:28:12.753282917 {

2026/05/13 15:28:12.753389347 new$fonts <- fonts

2026/05/13 15:28:12.753403483 new$version <- version
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753404315 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753419663 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753420445 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753449930 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753451092 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753464598 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753465419 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753477923 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753478704 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753491478 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753492450 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753510674 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753511495 if (!missing(colormodel))

2026/05/13 15:28:12.753590443 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753591295 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753605331 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753606223 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753629927 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/05/13 15:28:12.753645236 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753646067 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753664873 "default"))
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753665775 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753678491 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753681145 }
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753704499 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753705621 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753731079 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753732041 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/13 15:28:12.753754823 }
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753774580 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753775562 }
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753793536 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753794488 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753816459 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753817501 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753837807 domain = NA)
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753840872 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753859848 }
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753860730 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753874485 old$family <- family
2026/05/13 15:28:12.753875377 }

2026/05/13 15:28:12.753923407 else stop("invalid PDF version")
